title: Built a Binance Spot trading bot — looking for early testers (free 5-day access)
author: Accomplished-Arm6103
selftext:
Hey everyone,

I’ve been building a Binance Spot trading bot to help automate scanning, monitoring, and trade execution for people who don’t want to sit in front of charts all day.

The idea is simple: find stronger setups, filter out low-quality entries, manage trades automatically, and reduce manual chart watching.

What it currently does

✅ Binance Spot automation

✅ Momentum scanner for unusual market activity

✅ Delist protection alerts

✅ Telegram notifications

✅ Auto DCA support

✅ Take Profit / Stop Loss management

✅ Simple desktop setup (portable app)

How the system works

BOT 1 — Delist Finder

Monitors Binance delist and swap announcements

Automatically blacklists affected coins

Helps avoid entering assets that may be removed

BOT 2 — Momentum Scanner

Scans Binance USDT pairs every few minutes

Filters illiquid or already overextended moves

Uses trend, EMA, volume behavior, pullback confirmation, and breakout validation

Cooldown logic to avoid repeated signals/spam

Sends Telegram alerts and trading signals

BOT 3 — Auto Trader

Executes spot trades from scanner signals

Supports DCA entries at predefined levels

Automatically manages TP/SL after entry

Crash-safe restart recovery

Live updates via Telegram/Discord (PnL, price, TP/SL, DCA progress)

I’m currently looking for a few early testers to try it and give honest feedback on usability, bugs, features, and overall experience.

Free 5-day access for testers.

If you want to test it or see a quick demo, comment below and I’ll share details.

Disclaimer: This is a trading automation tool — not financial advice or a guarantee of profits. Crypto trading involves risk.
